summary: Invoice Branding & Authorization feature fully tested. All backend APIs working (GET/POST branding settings, generate-stamp). Frontend UI verified with all form fields, toggles, dropdowns, stamp generation (circle/square, blue/red/black), upload mode, and live invoice footer preview. Save functionality confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceBrandingSettings.jsx: All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
invoice_branding_routes.py: Proper validation of allowed fields, MongoDB upsert pattern used correctly
pdf_generation_routes.py: Branding settings properly fetched and applied to invoice HTML
adminApi.js: All branding API methods properly defined with correct endpoints

success_rate.backend: 100% (11 passed, 2 skipped - PDF tests skipped due to invoice lookup)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Branding feature is complete and working. Settings are stored in MongoDB 'business_settings' collection with type='invoice_branding'. Generated stamps are saved as SVG files in /app/backend/uploads/branding/. The PDF generation route at /api/pdf/invoices/{id} includes branding when show_signature or show_stamp is enabled.

GATE_1_SETTINGS_HUB_SECTION.details: Invoice Branding & Authorization section visible in Admin Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub

GATE_2_CFO_FIELDS.details: CFO Name and CFO Title fields visible and editable, current values: 'Jane M. Doe', 'Chief Finance Officer'

GATE_3_SIGNATURE_TOGGLE.details: Show Signature on Invoices toggle works, data-testid='toggle-show-signature-on-invoices'

GATE_4_STAMP_TOGGLE.details: Show Company Stamp on Invoices toggle works, data-testid='toggle-show-company-stamp-on-invoices'

GATE_5_STAMP_MODE_SELECT.details: Stamp Mode select has 'Generate Stamp' and 'Upload Existing Stamp' options

GATE_6_GENERATED_STAMP_FIELDS.details: When Generate Stamp selected: Shape (Circle/Square), Color (Blue/Red/Black), Company Name, City, Reg Number, TIN, Phrase fields visible

GATE_7_PREVIEW_STAMP_BUTTON.details: Preview Stamp button generates visible SVG stamp, data-testid='generate-stamp-btn'

GATE_8_INVOICE_FOOTER_PREVIEW.details: Invoice Footer Preview shows Authorized By section (CFO name/title) and Company Stamp section

GATE_9_SAVE_BUTTON.details: Save Branding Settings button saves to database, shows 'Saved' confirmation, data-testid='save-branding-btn'

GATE_10_GET_API.details: GET /api/admin/settings/invoice-branding returns saved settings with all expected fields

GATE_11_POST_API.details: POST /api/admin/settings/invoice-branding saves settings and returns updated data

GATE_13_PDF_ENDPOINT.details: GET /api/pdf/invoices/{id} returns PDF with branding when enabled

GATE_14_CIRCLE_STAMP.details: Circle stamp generates correctly with curved text paths

GATE_15_SQUARE_STAMP.details: Square stamp generates correctly with rectangular border

GATE_16_COLOR_OPTIONS.details: All color options (blue=#1a4b8c, red=#b91c1c, black=#1e293b) work correctly

GATE_17_UPLOAD_MODE.details: Upload mode shows stamp upload area with 'Company Stamp (PNG transparent preferred)' label
